cases.title: TS-24: GPS disabled or permission denied on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled with Vietnamese recovery message
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QrToken per testing-plan §3 TS-24
Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie
Request body omits latitude/longitude simulating client GPS unavailable after permission denial
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c and error-handling §4.4
Assert errorCode GpsDisabled preserved in English for client logic
Verify no Present attendance created; student may retry after enabling GPS per BR-12
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-24 row covered: GPS disabled/permission denied surfaces GpsDisabled with Vietnamese recovery copy per NFR-19 and AC-08c

cases.title: CheckInService.submit with missing coordinates returns GpsDisabled and leaves Pending attendance for recovery retry
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
Active session with enrolled student Pending attendance and Valid qr_tokens row
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService and check_in_attempts repository
locationPayload omits latitude and longitude (GPS unavailable per BR-12)
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayloadWithoutCoords, studentId)
Assert returned outcome GpsDisabled without unhandled exception
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending (afterState unchanged)
Query check_in_attempts and assert row inserted with outcome GpsDisabled
Query qr_tokens and assert token status remains Valid (not Consumed)
cases.expected: NFR-19 module boundary: GpsDisabled rejection preserves retry path — Pending attendance and Valid token remain so student can recover after granting GPS per BR-12 and ui-states §4.2

cases.title: Permission guide content catalog resolves platform-specific Vietnamese steps for camera and GPS types
preconditions: Message catalog or PermissionGuideModal content module exported with locale vi-VN
Content keys defined for type camera|gps and platform ios|android per common-ui-components §5.2
Production quality bar §3 requires permission-denied modals with platform-specific Vietnamese instructions
steps: Resolve permission guide content for type camera and platform ios; assert non-empty Vietnamese numbered steps
Resolve permission guide content for type camera and platform android; assert steps differ from ios variant
Resolve permission guide content for type gps and platform ios; assert non-empty Vietnamese steps referencing location settings
Resolve permission guide content for type gps and platform android; assert steps differ from ios variant
Assert no content block is English-only or empty stub per NFR-17 localization bar
cases.expected: NFR-19 content module: clear Vietnamese platform-specific instructions available for both camera and GPS denial flows per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4 NFR-19 target

cases.title: GpsDisabled check-in attempt leaves Attendance Pending enabling post-permission retry
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid
Student previously denied GPS permission on client
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending from database
Submit check-in without coordinates via CheckInService or POST /check-in
Assert outcome GpsDisabled and CheckInAttempt logged
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending
Simulate client retry with valid in-radius coordinates after permission grant
Assert second submit succeeds with afterState Present when other rules pass
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on GpsDisabled; NFR-19 recovery path allows successful retry after student enables GPS per ui-states §4.2 and user-flows §3 GpsDisabled row

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in without GPS coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled envelope with actionable Vietnamese message
preconditions: API running on port 3001 against Compose PostgreSQL
Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
Request body includes tokenId only; latitude and longitude omitted
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 400 Bad Request and Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per error-handling §4.4
Assert message is Vietnamese user-facing text suitable for CheckInOutcomePanel display with recovery CTA
cases.expected: HTTP 400 GpsDisabled contract per API design §6.3; server-side recovery message in Vietnamese per NFR-19 error clarity dimension and AC-08c

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in with gpsAvailable false client flag returns 400 GpsDisabled before radius evaluation
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QrToken
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Request body includes tokenId and gpsAvailable false signaling browser permission denial
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and gpsAvailable false using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome GpsDisabled
Assert localized Vietnamese message returned for mobile client recovery display
Verify no Present attendance created and token not Consumed
cases.expected: NFR-19 server contract: explicit client GPS denial signal maps to GpsDisabled with Vietnamese recovery message per validation-rules §4 BR-12 mapping

cases.title: iOS 15+ Safari: camera permission denied opens PermissionGuideModal with platform-specific Vietnamese steps
preconditions: Playwright emulates iPhone 12+ iOS 15+ Safari viewport 375×812
Authenticated enrolled Student session on /check-in route
Browser camera permission denied or blocked via context permissions
QrScannerView mounted in scanning step per ui-states §4.1 camera_denied state
steps: Navigate to /check-in on iOS Safari emulation
Verify CheckInFlow enters camera_denied state when getUserMedia denied
Verify PermissionGuideModal opens with type camera and platform ios
Assert modal title and body copy entirely in Vietnamese (vi-VN)
Assert numbered list ol contains iOS-specific steps (Settings → Safari → Camera) per accessibility-basics §12
Verify Đóng button closes modal and focus returns to scanner per §10 focus trap rules
cases.expected: NFR-19 iOS camera denial: clear Vietnamese platform-specific recovery instructions in PermissionGuideModal per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4 verification method

cases.title: Android 10+ Chrome: camera permission denied shows Android-specific PermissionGuideModal steps
preconditions: Playwright emulates Android mid-range device Chrome Android 10+ viewport 360×640
Authenticated enrolled Student session on /check-in
Camera permission denied in browser context
QrScannerView active per event-specific-components §2.1
steps: Navigate to /check-in on Android Chrome emulation
Trigger camera permission denial on QrScannerView getUserMedia call
Verify PermissionGuideModal type camera platform android displayed
Assert Android-specific Vietnamese steps differ from iOS Safari content (e.g. Chrome site settings path)
Verify modal accessible via data-testid and keyboard focus trap per accessibility-basics §10
Verify flow does not advance to gps_capture until camera access restored or deep-link token entry used
cases.expected: NFR-19 Android camera denial: platform-specific Vietnamese instructions per production-ui-quality-bar §3 permission-denied modals Safari vs Chrome

cases.title: GPS permission denied on GpsCaptureStep shows GpsDisabled outcome with Hướng dẫn cấp quyền CTA
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with valid token deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Active session configured; flow advanced past QR scan to gps_capture step
Browser geolocation permission denied in Playwright context
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with geolocation permission denied
Verify GpsCaptureStep enters permission-denied substate per ui-states §4.2
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel GpsDisabled danger variant displays message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Tap CTA Hướng dẫn cấp quyền and verify PermissionGuideModal type gps opens
Assert no POST /check-in API call occurred while permission denied per validation-rules §5.1 client guard
Verify role alert on blocking error per accessibility-basics §6
cases.expected: NFR-19 GPS denial UX: GpsDisabled panel with actionable CTA opening platform-specific help modal; no premature API submit per AC-08c and user-flows §3

cases.title: Permission-denied check-in error screens document instructor manual attendance fallback link
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport at /check-in
Active session with valid token; GPS or camera permission denied
GpsDisabled or camera_denied state displayed per ui-states §4
Production quality bar §3 requires manual attendance fallback link on student check-in error screens
steps: Navigate to check-in flow and trigger GpsDisabled or camera_denied state
Verify visible link or text block explaining manual fallback: contact instructor or see instructor for manual mark
Assert fallback copy in Vietnamese references instructor manual attendance per FR-11 and BR-10
Verify link does not navigate to instructor-only routes without role guard
Cross-check copy aligns with risk R-07 mitigation in 07-non-functional-risk §3
cases.expected: NFR-19 target satisfied: instructor manual fallback documented in UI when camera or GPS unavailable per FR-11 fallback traceability and production-ui-quality-bar §3

cases.title: PermissionGuideModal help link opens device-settings guidance distinct for Safari vs Chrome
preconditions: Authenticated Student on /check-in with GpsDisabled or camera_denied state
PermissionGuideModal component mounted with detectable platform prop
Both iOS Safari and Android Chrome Playwright contexts available
steps: On iOS Safari emulation, open PermissionGuideModal via Hướng dẫn cấp quyền CTA
Capture iOS-specific step text content
On Android Chrome emulation, open PermissionGuideModal for same permission type
Capture Android-specific step text content
Assert iOS and Android step sequences are not identical (platform-specific per NFR-19 target)
Verify help content includes link or instructions to device/browser settings per AC-08c help link requirement
cases.expected: NFR-19 platform-specific steps: Safari and Chrome permission recovery instructions differ appropriately in Vietnamese per common-ui-components §5.2 platform prop

cases.title: LocationConsentBanner displays GPS privacy copy before first location permission request
preconditions: Authenticated Student on first visit to /check-in (no prior consent stored in localStorage)
Active session with valid token deep link
CheckInFlow consent step per ui-states §4.1
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on mobile viewport
Verify LocationConsentBanner visible before geolocation API invoked
Assert banner copy in Vietnamese explains one-time location use and GPS not stored after success per ui-ux-foundation §8
Accept consent and verify flow advances to scanning or gps_capture
On return visit verify banner not shown again unless consent cleared
cases.expected: NFR-19 permission onboarding: consent copy primes student before GPS prompt reducing denial rate per prompt.md §2.2 and ui-ux-foundation §6 step 2 Permissions

cases.title: UX walkthrough: iOS physical device with camera and GPS denied completes recovery guidance review
preconditions: iPhone 12+ iOS 15+ Safari on same LAN as staging API per testing-plan §9 device matrix
Enrolled student credentials; Active session with QR displayed
Device settings configured to deny camera and/or location for Safari
Pilot readiness checklist template for NFR-19 verification method
steps: Login as student on physical iOS Safari and navigate to check-in flow
Deny or pre-block camera permission; verify PermissionGuideModal type camera with iOS Vietnamese steps
Grant camera; deny GPS permission; verify GpsDisabled panel and PermissionGuideModal type gps
Verify manual attendance fallback link visible on error screen
Record pass/fail with device model, OS version, and screenshot references in checklist
cases.expected: NFR-19 verification method: UX walkthrough on iOS with permissions denied confirms clear Vietnamese recovery guidance per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4

cases.title: UX walkthrough: Android physical device with camera and GPS denied completes recovery guidance review
preconditions: Android 10+ Chrome mid-range device on staging LAN per testing-plan §9
Enrolled student credentials; Active session with valid QR
Device app permissions set to deny Camera and Location for Chrome
Pilot readiness checklist for NFR-19 Android verification
steps: Login as student on physical Android Chrome and open check-in flow
Trigger camera permission denial; verify Android-specific PermissionGuideModal Vietnamese steps
Trigger GPS permission denial; verify GpsDisabled outcome and gps guide modal
Verify help link content references Chrome/Android settings path
Document device model, OS version, browser version, and pass/fail in pilot checklist
cases.expected: NFR-19 verification method: UX walkthrough on Android with permissions denied confirms platform-specific Vietnamese recovery steps per testing-plan §9 NFR-19 column

cases.title: GPS acquisition client timeout after 15 seconds shows GpsDisabled UX without API submit
preconditions: Authenticated Student on /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId mobile viewport
Geolocation permission granted but mock returns no fix within 15 s timeout per AC-08c
GpsCaptureStep acquiring-fix substate active per ui-states §4.2
steps: Navigate to gps_capture step with geolocation mock that never resolves within 15 s
Verify acquiring-fix spinner displays Đang yêu cầu quyền định vị… or equivalent status text
Wait 15 seconds and verify transition to GpsDisabled outcome or permission-denied substate
Assert no POST /check-in network request fired before timeout boundary
Verify GpsDisabled message and Hướng dẫn cấp quyền CTA displayed
Verify Thử lại retry control available up to 3 attempts per ui-states §4.2
cases.expected: NFR-19 boundary: 15 s client GPS timeout triggers GpsDisabled recovery UX without server round-trip per AC-08c and validation-rules mobile check-in rule

cases.title: Camera permanently denied blocks QR scan with recovery-only path and no silent failure
preconditions: Authenticated Student on /check-in mobile viewport
Camera permission permanently denied (not promptable) in browser context
No alternative token deep link pre-filled
steps: Navigate to /check-in scanning step with camera permanently denied
Verify QrScannerView does not show blank viewfinder without explanation
Verify PermissionGuideModal type camera or inline Alert with Vietnamese recovery instructions
Verify no silent failure or English-only browser default error text per production-ui-quality-bar §4 Not acceptable
Verify student can dismiss modal and see manual fallback or deep-link token entry if supported
cases.expected: NFR-19 camera denial boundary: permanent camera block surfaces clear Vietnamese recovery guidance; no raw API error or silent failure per ui-states §4.1 camera_denied

cases.title: PermissionGuideModal meets accessibility bar: numbered steps, focus trap, and reachable Đóng control
preconditions: PermissionGuideModal open on /check-in with type gps or camera
axe-core or manual accessibility audit harness available
accessibility-basics §10 and §12 requirements for permission help
steps: Open PermissionGuideModal via Hướng dẫn cấp quyền from GpsDisabled or camera_denied state
Verify recovery steps rendered as numbered ol list per accessibility-basics §6
Tab through modal and verify focus trapped inside until Đóng clicked
Verify aria-labelledby references modal title in Vietnamese
Press Escape or tap Đóng and verify focus returns to triggering CTA
Run axe-core on modal subtree and assert no critical violations on permission help dialog
cases.expected: NFR-19 help content accessible: PermissionGuideModal readable steps with focus trap and dismiss control per accessibility-basics §10–§12 aligned with NFR-19 error clarity

cases.title: Student recovers from GpsDisabled by granting permission and retrying check-in successfully
preconditions: Authenticated Student on /check-in with valid token deep link
Initial geolocation permission denied producing GpsDisabled panel
Active session with in-radius coordinates available after permission grant
Attendance status Pending for student
steps: Navigate to check-in and trigger GpsDisabled via denied geolocation
Follow PermissionGuideModal instructions (simulated) and grant geolocation in browser context
Tap Thử lại or primary retry CTA on GpsDisabled panel
Verify GpsCaptureStep acquires coordinates and submits check-in
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel success variant Điểm danh thành công with CTA Xong
Verify no stale GpsDisabled message remains after successful recovery
cases.expected: NFR-19 recovery path end-to-end: permission-denied guidance enables student to grant GPS and complete check-in per user-flows §3 GpsDisabled recovery action and BR-12 retry semantics

cases.title: ErrorMapper GpsDisabled maps to Vietnamese message with recovery action suitable for PermissionGuideModal link
preconditions: ErrorMapper module integrated with @wecheck/domain vi-VN catalog
GpsDisabled domain outcome defined in error-handling §4.4
Frontend maps GpsDisabled outcome to CheckInOutcomePanel danger variant per ui-states §4.3
steps: Invoke ErrorMapper.map for outcome GpsDisabled
Assert message equals Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Assert message is actionable (implies enabling GPS) not generic failure text
Verify frontend outcome-to-CTA mapping assigns Hướng dẫn cấp quyền primary action for GpsDisabled
Verify errorCode remains English GpsDisabled separate from Vietnamese message per NFR-17 rule
cases.expected: NFR-19 integration: server and client error mapping delivers Vietnamese GpsDisabled copy with implied recovery action linking to PermissionGuideModal per error-handling §7 frontend presentation

cases.title: Camera consent block displays Vietnamese privacy copy before first getUserMedia request
preconditions: Authenticated Student first visit to /check-in scanning step
No prior camera consent stored
ui-ux-foundation §8 camera consent block defined
steps: Navigate to /check-in scanning step on mobile viewport
Verify camera privacy notice displayed before getUserMedia invoked
Assert copy in Vietnamese explains camera used only for QR scan and images not uploaded per ui-ux-foundation §8
Proceed past consent and verify camera permission prompt appears
Verify denial path opens PermissionGuideModal per NFR-19 camera flow
cases.expected: NFR-19 permission onboarding: camera consent priming reduces denial confusion with Vietnamese purpose-limited copy before browser prompt per production-ui-quality-bar §4 GPS/camera consent requirement
